name: mekstation-app
description: BattleTech unit construction and customization tool

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run verify:qc && npm run test:stable
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:perf-sensitive && npm run verify:rules && npm run build
scripts.verify:app-completion: npm run qc:app-completion && npm run verify:qc && npm run verify:rules && npm run electron:test:build
scripts.verify:app-completion:release: npm run qc:app-completion:release && npm run verify:app-completion
scripts.verify:app-completion:release-full: npm run verify:qc:roadmap && npm run verify:qc && npm run verify:qc:scenarios && npm run electron:test:build
scripts.verify:qc: npm run qc:openspec-ci:validate && npm run qc:validate && npm run qc:journeys:validate && npm run qc:lifecycle:status && npm run qc:ui-flow-shell:validate && npm run qc:gm:campaign-ledger:validate && npm run qc:gm:time-cascade:validate && npm run qc:tactical:projection:validate && npm run qc:combat:catalog-rules:validate && npm run qc:known-gaps:validate && npm run verify:qc:build-journeys && npm run verify:qc:campaign-journeys && npm run verify:qc:campaign-long && npm run verify:qc:combat-4v4 && npm run qc:logging:validate && npm run maintain:scan:gate && node scripts/qc/validate-maintenance-warning-ledger.mjs
scripts.verify:rules: npm run qc:combat:catalog-rules:validate && npm run validate:combat:gaps -- --format=summary --expect-total=0 && npm run validate:combat:gaps -- --level=out-of-scope --format=summary --expect-total=147 --expect-level=out-of-scope:147 --expect-scope=aggregate:3 --expect-scope=leaf:144 --expect-section=actions:29 --expect-section=damageAndDeath:6 --expect-section=eventStream:15 --expect-section=featureSupport:75 --expect-section=lifecycleAndPsr:2 --expect-section=pilotSkills:9 --expect-section=ruleSupport:6 --expect-section=validationScope:5 && npm run validate:combat && npm run spec:purpose:validate:strict && npx openspec validate --all --strict
scripts.validate:refactor: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.analyze:dependencies: npx madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx --exclude node_modules --json src/ > dependency-analysis.json
scripts.refactor:validate: npm run analyze:files && npm run test && npm run lint
scripts.refactor:pre-commit: npm run analyze:files && npm run test:coverage && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.quality:check: npm run analyze:files && npm run analyze:complexity && npm run test:coverage
scripts.quality:report: npm run analyze:files:report && npm run analyze:complexity && npm run analyze:dependencies && echo 'Quality analysis complete. Check generated reports.'
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run build
scripts.electron:pack: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run pack
scripts.electron:dist: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run dist
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:win
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:mac
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:linux
scripts.electron:dist:all: npm run electron:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:all
scripts.verify:qc:app-shell: npm run qc:app-shell-routes:validate && node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/app-shell-route-proof.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:journeys: npm run qc:journeys:validate && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=all --tier=smoke
scripts.verify:qc:ui-flow-shell: npm run qc:ui-flow-shell:validate && npm run qc:ui-flow-shell -- --journey=all --json
scripts.verify:qc:mek-build: npm run qc:wave4:family-data:validate && npm run validate:bv && node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/customizer.spec.ts e2e/exotic-mech.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:build-journeys: npm run verify:qc:character-build && npm run verify:qc:mek-build && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=character-build --tier=smoke --require-domain-backed && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=mek-build --tier=smoke --require-domain-backed
scripts.verify:qc:encounter-combat-continuity: npm.cmd test -- --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath src/components/gameplay/pages/preBattle/__tests__/usePreBattleLaunch.test.ts src/components/gameplay/pages/preBattle/__tests__/preBattleLaunchLinkage.test.ts src/__tests__/integration/campaignCombatLoop.test.ts && node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/encounter-combat-continuity.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:replay-recovery: npm.cmd test -- --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath src/simulation/__tests__/replay-determinism.integration.test.ts src/stores/__tests__/useGameplayStore.recover.test.ts src/engine/__tests__/InteractiveSession.recovery.test.ts && node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/active-session-recovery.spec.ts --workers=1 && node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/replay-player.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:multiplayer:browser: node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/p2p-sync.spec.ts e2e/playtest-mp-smoke.spec.ts e2e/playtest-coop-route-smoke.spec.ts e2e/multiplayer-live-vault-auth.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:multiplayer-reliability: npm run verify:qc:multiplayer:contracts && npm run verify:qc:multiplayer:browser
scripts.verify:qc:gm:campaign-ledger: npm run qc:gm:campaign-ledger:validate && npm.cmd test -- --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath scripts/__tests__/gm-campaign-ledger-qc.test.ts src/lib/interventions/__tests__/GmCampaignInterventionImplementer.test.ts src/lib/interventions/__tests__/GmCampaignInterventionBoundaries.test.ts src/components/campaign/gm/__tests__/GmCampaignInterventionControlPlane.test.tsx src/components/campaign/__tests__/CampaignNavigation.test.tsx && npm run verify:qc:gm:campaign-browser
scripts.verify:qc:gm:time-cascade: npm run qc:gm:time-cascade:validate && npm.cmd test -- --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath scripts/__tests__/gm-time-cascade-qc.test.ts src/lib/interventions/__tests__/GmRosterRecoveryProjection.test.ts src/lib/interventions/__tests__/GmTimeCascadeInterventionImplementer.test.ts src/lib/interventions/__tests__/GmCampaignInterventionBoundaries.test.ts src/lib/campaign/processors/__tests__/processors.test.ts src/lib/campaign/processors/__tests__/repairProgressProcessor.test.ts src/lib/campaign/processors/__tests__/marketProcessors.test.ts src/components/campaign/gm/__tests__/GmCampaignInterventionControlPlane.test.tsx && npm run verify:qc:gm:campaign-browser
scripts.verify:qc:campaign-journeys: npm run qc:journeys:validate && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=contract-campaign --tier=smoke --require-domain-backed && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=campaign-short --tier=smoke --require-domain-backed && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=campaign-long --tier=smoke --contracts=10 --require-domain-backed
scripts.verify:qc:campaign-long: npm run qc:campaign-long:validate && npm run qc:campaign-long:stability -- --seed=42 --contracts=10 --runs=2 && npm run qc:campaign-long:browser
scripts.verify:qc:combat-4v4: npm run qc:combat-4v4:validate && npm.cmd test -- --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath src/__tests__/integration/combat4v4JourneyProof.test.ts --runInBand && npm run qc:journeys -- --journey=combat-4v4 --tier=smoke --seed=42 --player-units=4 --opponent-units=4 --require-domain-backed
scripts.verify:qc:campaign-economy:browser: node scripts/playwright/run-playwright.mjs test --project=chromium e2e/campaign-organic-contract.spec.ts e2e/campaign-economy-browser.spec.ts e2e/campaign-acquisition-browser.spec.ts e2e/campaign-flow.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:qc:campaign-economy: npm run verify:qc:campaign-economy:contracts && npm run verify:qc:campaign-economy:browser
scripts.verify:qc:wave3: npm run qc:wave3:validate && npm run verify:qc:encounter-combat-continuity && npm run verify:qc:tactical:projection && npm run verify:qc:tactical:visual && npm run verify:rules
scripts.verify:qc:wave4:customizer-data: npm run qc:wave4:family-data:validate && npm run validate:assets:strict && npm run schema:gen-check && npm run validate:bv && npm run validate:vehicle && npm run validate:aerospace && npm run validate:ba-bv && npm run validate:proto && npm run validate:infantry
scripts.verify:qc:wave4:nonbattlemech-scope: npm run qc:nonbattlemech:scope:validate && npm run validate:combat:gaps -- --level=out-of-scope --format=summary --expect-total=147 --expect-level=out-of-scope:147 --expect-scope=aggregate:3 --expect-scope=leaf:144 --expect-section=actions:29 --expect-section=damageAndDeath:6 --expect-section=eventStream:15 --expect-section=featureSupport:75 --expect-section=lifecycleAndPsr:2 --expect-section=pilotSkills:9 --expect-section=ruleSupport:6 --expect-section=validationScope:5 && npm run validate:combat
scripts.verify:qc:wave4: npm run qc:wave4:validate && npm run verify:qc:wave4:customizer-data && npm run verify:qc:wave4:nonbattlemech-scope && npm run verify:qc:multiplayer-reliability && npm run verify:qc:replay-recovery
scripts.verify:qc:tactical:projection: npm run qc:tactical:projection:validate && npm run verify:qc:tactical:quick
scripts.verify:qc:roadmap: npm run qc:app-completion:release -- --json && npm run qc:manual-automation-gaps:validate && npm run qc:surface-browser:validate && npm run qc:scenarios:validate && npm run qc:journeys:validate && npm run qc:wave3:validate && npm run qc:wave4:validate && npm run verify:qc:maintenance
